body: Priya, it was great connecting at the [Greentown Labs](orgs/greentown-labs) demo day last week — always good to spend time with people who are thinking seriously about the intersection of climate and deep tech. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about co-investing at the seed stage, because I think there's a real opportunity for [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and Sequoia to develop a more systematic referral cadence given how much our theses overlap. We're seeing a lot of interesting companies coming through on the AI infrastructure for grid optimization side, and a handful of those are probably better fits for your check size than ours by the time they hit Series B. Happy to set up a standing monthly sync if that sounds useful — even a 30-minute call would help us stay aligned on what each of us is actively tracking. Let me know what your schedule looks like in the next couple of weeks.
